name: TickFlow Assist
description: A-share watchlist analysis, monitoring, and alert delivery powered by TickFlow and OpenClaw.

tickflowApiUrl.description: TickFlow API base URL. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_TICKFLOW_API_URL or TICKFLOW_API_URL.

tickflowApiKey.description: TickFlow API key used for market and financial data. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_TICKFLOW_API_KEY or TICKFLOW_API_KEY.

tickflowApiKeyLevel.description: TickFlow subscription level. Pro and Expert enable intraday K-line fetching. Can also come from TICKFLOW_ASSIST_TICKFLOW_API_KEY_LEVEL or TICKFLOW_API_KEY_LEVEL.

mxSearchApiUrl.description: MX Search API base URL. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_MX_SEARCH_API_URL or MX_SEARCH_API_URL.

mxSearchApiKey.description: Configure this during setup if you want mx_search, mx_select_stock, and non-Expert financial fallback. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_MX_SEARCH_API_KEY, MX_SEARCH_API_KEY, or MX_APIKEY.

jin10McpUrl.description: Jin10 MCP server URL used for realtime flash monitoring. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_JIN10_MCP_URL or JIN10_MCP_URL.

jin10ApiToken.description: Configure this during setup to keep the managed Jin10 realtime flash monitor fully available. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_JIN10_API_TOKEN or JIN10_API_TOKEN.

jin10FlashPollInterval.description: Jin10 flash polling interval in seconds.

jin10FlashRetentionDays.description: How many days of raw Jin10 flash data to retain locally.

jin10FlashNightAlert.description: When true, flash alerts fire 24/7. When false, suppress alerts between 22:00 and 06:00 Beijing time.

llmBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM API base URL. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_BASE_URL or LLM_BASE_URL.

llmApiKey.description: API key for the analysis model endpoint configured in llmBaseUrl. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_API_KEY or LLM_API_KEY.

llmModel.description: Model name used for analysis. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_MODEL or LLM_MODEL.

requestInterval.description: Realtime monitoring polling interval in seconds.

dailyUpdateNotify.description: Whether scheduled daily update and post-close review send notifications.

alertChannel.description: Configure this during setup for alert delivery, e.g. telegram, qqbot, wecom.

alertTarget.description: Configure this during setup for test_alert, monitoring alerts, and scheduled notifications.

pythonBin.description: Python launcher used for indicator calculation.

pythonArgs.description: Arguments passed to pythonBin before indicator_runner.py.

pythonWorkdir.description: Working directory for the Python indicator bridge.

tickflowApiKey.label: TickFlow API Key
tickflowApiKey.help: Used for TickFlow market and financial data. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_TICKFLOW_API_KEY or TICKFLOW_API_KEY.

tickflowApiKeyLevel.label: TickFlow API Key Level
tickflowApiKeyLevel.help: Set this to your actual TickFlow subscription level, or provide it via TICKFLOW_ASSIST_TICKFLOW_API_KEY_LEVEL / TICKFLOW_API_KEY_LEVEL.

mxSearchApiKey.label: MX Search API Key
mxSearchApiKey.help: Configure this during setup if you want mx_search, mx_select_stock, and lite financial fallback, or use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_MX_SEARCH_API_KEY / MX_SEARCH_API_KEY / MX_APIKEY.

jin10McpUrl.label: Jin10 MCP URL
jin10McpUrl.help: Configure this together with the Jin10 token for the managed flash monitor, or use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_JIN10_MCP_URL / JIN10_MCP_URL.

jin10ApiToken.label: Jin10 API Token
jin10ApiToken.help: Configure this during setup to keep the managed Jin10 flash monitor fully available, or use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_JIN10_API_TOKEN / JIN10_API_TOKEN.

jin10FlashPollInterval.label: Jin10 Poll Interval
jin10FlashPollInterval.help: Polling interval in seconds for Jin10 flash monitoring.

jin10FlashRetentionDays.label: Jin10 Retention Days
jin10FlashRetentionDays.help: How many days of Jin10 raw flash data to keep locally.

jin10FlashNightAlert.label: Jin10 Night Alert
jin10FlashNightAlert.help: Set to false to suppress flash alerts between 22:00-06:00 Beijing time.

llmBaseUrl.label: LLM Base URL
llmBaseUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible analysis endpoint. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_BASE_URL or LLM_BASE_URL.

llmApiKey.label: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.help: Used for analysis model requests. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_API_KEY or LLM_API_KEY.

llmModel.label: LLM Model
llmModel.help: Model name used for stock analysis. Leave empty to use TICKFLOW_ASSIST_LLM_MODEL or LLM_MODEL.

alertChannel.label: Alert Channel
alertChannel.help: Configure this during setup before enabling alert delivery.

alertTarget.label: Alert Target
alertTarget.help: Configure this during setup for test_alert, monitoring alerts, and scheduled notifications.
